post.howTowriteDes: You’re ready to ask a programming-related question and this form will help guide you through the process. Looking to ask a non-programming question? See the topics here to find a relevant site.
post.step1: • Summarize your problem in a one-line title.
post.step2: • Describe your problem in more detail.
post.step3: • Describe what you tried and what you expected to happen.
post.step4: • Add “tags” which help surface your question to members of the band.
post.step5: • Review your question and post it to the site.

securtyLogin.deleteAccTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
securtyLogin.deleteAccDes:
Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data, including your profile, settings, saved content, and any associated information. This action cannot be undone. 
Do you still want to proceed?

question.deleteDes: Delet question will remove it permanently along with all its answers and comments. Do you still want to proceed?

answer.acceptDes: Once confirmed, this answer will be highlighted as the official solution to the question, and other users will see it as the accepted answer. You can still change this later if needed
answer.acceptUpdatedDes: This will set the new answer as the correct solution, and the current correct answer will lose its status. Are you sure you want to make this change?
answer.unacceptedDes: Are you sure you want to cancel the correct status of this answer?
answer.deteteDes: deleting this answer, you will remove any votes and comments associated with it. Are you sure you want to continue?
